description: Happy path: mix of personal rates and benchmark fallback returns correctly labeled sources with disclaimer

expect.rate_card: array of 4 objects, one per format in format_list
expect.personal_rate_items: long-form-integration and dedicated-video have source: personal_rate with rate_or_range matching input exactly
expect.benchmark_items: short-form and pinterest-pin have source: benchmark_range with rate_or_range from benchmarks.json
expect.disclaimer: non-null string present because benchmark_range items exist
expect.recommended_negotiation_floor: string or null derived from benchmark entries only

prohibit: personal rates reformatted, rounded, or adjusted from the input values
benchmark ranges presented without source: benchmark_range label
disclaimer absent when benchmark_range items are in the card
fabricated rates for formats not covered by either source

description: Minimal input: format_list only with no alex_actual_rates; all formats fall back to benchmarks

expect.disclaimer: non-null disclaimer string stating these are industry reference ranges
expect.recommended_negotiation_floor: present if benchmark data includes a floor

prohibit: source: personal_rate on any item when alex_actual_rates was not provided
disclaimer null when all items are benchmark_range
fabricated rate values not from benchmarks.json

description: Edge case: format_list includes an unrecognized format key; atom returns no_data with gap note

expect.known_format: long-form-integration has source: personal_rate with rate_or_range '2500'
expect.unknown_format: podcast-ad-read has source: no_data, rate_or_range: null, and notes flagging the unrecognized format
expect.disclaimer: null because the only non-personal item is no_data, not benchmark_range

prohibit: fabricated rate for the unrecognized podcast-ad-read format
source: benchmark_range for a format not in benchmarks.json
notes null on the no_data item; the gap must be explained
atom erroring or halting on an unrecognized format key
